series_metadata.series_description: An order issued by the Boiler section because there has been a violation of the Ohio Revised Code. The order specifies in detail the violation and the section of the law that is in violation. The order is sent by certified mail and a signed return recei

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Retain master microfilm in appropriate storage facility until record series is no longer created, then destroy. Retain diazo in operating area until records are no longer being created or received by this agency ; Paper: Retain for one year after the decision is made, microfilm records. After microfilm has been checked for quality and completeness, then transfer records to Archives, Microform: Wastepaper ; Paper: Archives
